overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a high-speed night ride through neon-lit Night City streets, covered highways, and tunnels. The journey passes iconic holographic billboards and transitions between open urban environments and enclosed infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban intersection and downtown streets

events.description: motorcycle accelerates from stop through city intersection
passing other vehicles on multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: accelerating motorcycle through wet city streets, navigating crosswalks and intersections

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in same direction

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall building covered in bright neon advertisements and signage
elevated highway overpass crossing above the street
tall street lighting pole with multiple lamps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city intersection with wet roads reflecting neon lights. The motorcycle accelerates through crosswalks, passing under concrete overpasses while surrounded by towering buildings covered in bright advertisements. Sparse traffic moves ahead as the rider builds speed through the downtown streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with blue neon lighting

events.description: entering covered highway underpass with blue neon ceiling lights
passing large holographic fish billboard floating above highway

agents.ego_description: speeding through covered highway section at high velocity, passing under neon-lit structures

entered.detail: concrete ceiling structure covering the highway with integrated lighting
glowing blue neon light strips running along the tunnel walls
smooth concrete barrier wall along the right side of the highway
large three-dimensional holographic projection of a blue fish swimming in the air

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a covered highway section illuminated by blue neon strips. The environment shifts from open sky to an enclosed concrete tunnel. A massive holographic fish billboard floats overhead as the rider speeds through the sheltered corridor, with concrete walls replacing the open cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with yellow safety barriers and warning signage

events.description: exiting covered highway back to open elevated roadway
navigating gentle curve in elevated highway

agents.ego_description: high-speed driving on elevated highway, weaving through moderate traffic past warning signs

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving in same lane ahead

entered.detail: bright yellow concrete safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated highway
tall modern building with reflective glass facade rising beside the highway
large yellow warning signs with black text mounted on the left barrier
night sky visible above the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered highway, the scene opens to an elevated roadway with yellow safety barriers. The motorcycle speeds past warning signs with glass skyscrapers towering on the left. The road curves gently through the open air, with moderate traffic visible ahead and neon-lit buildings surrounding the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark highway tunnel with metal fencing and emerging city intersection

events.description: entering dark tunnel section with metal grating walls
emerging from tunnel back to city street intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing down through dark tunnel section, then emerging and navigating toward city intersection

entered.detail: metal mesh fence running along the right side of the dark tunnel
dark concrete walls of the tunnel with minimal lighting
traffic light visible ahead at the tunnel exit
city street intersection with crosswalks and traffic controls

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a darker tunnel section with metal grating on the right and dim overhead lighting. Speed decreases as the rider navigates the enclosed space. The tunnel opens to reveal a city street intersection with traffic signals ahead, transitioning from the confined dark space back to the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed motorcycle journey that transitions from open neon-lit city streets through enclosed highway corridors and back into the urban sprawl. It begins at a wet city intersection, accelerating past towering advertisements and under concrete overpasses as the road reflects the surrounding glow. As the rider builds speed, the environment shifts from the open sky into a covered highway section illuminated by blue neon strips, where a massive holographic fish floats overhead within the concrete tunnel. The scene then opens back into the air onto an elevated roadway with yellow safety barriers and glass skyscrapers before curving toward a darker, confined tunnel with metal grating and dim lighting. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness to reveal a city street intersection with traffic signals, returning the rider to the vibrant urban environment.
